name: every catalog entry either declares a native option_form (the tool's own vocabulary) or is explicitly marked optionless (per_rule_options none)
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'bad=[]; YAML.unsafe_load_file(ARGV[0])["tools"].each{|k,v| bad<<k unless v["option_form"] || v["per_rule_options"]=="none" || v["per_rule_options"]=="limited"}; STDERR.puts("undeclared=#{bad.inspect}"); exit(bad.empty? ? 0 : 1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/tool-option-surfaces.yaml" && echo every-tool-option-form-declared 1>&2
